series_metadata.series_description: Requests for Service (RFS) are requests for information, products, or services submitted to the Strategic Analysis and Information Center (SAIC) and/or the Statewide Terrorism Analysis and Crime Center (STACC). RFS can come from, but not limited to, other state fusion centers, law enforcement, federal agencies and other recognized partners of the SAIC/STACC.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until entered electronically, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for ten (10) years from date of receipt., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
